hooks.command: echo '{"additionalContext": "[HOOK REMINDER after Edit/Write] (1) Update CODEBASE_MAP.md if backend files touched (2) npm test before commit (3) Backend files = commit only, no deploy (4) META-RULE: did this edit expose a new bug class? Add audit skill invariant. (5) ANTI-VIBE: same pattern already exists 3+ places? → extract to shared. Used Math.random for a URL token? → crypto.getRandomValues. Wrote to a public doc? → no user.uid/admin field. Added a new Firestore collection? → verify reader AND writer AND size-justification."}'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "(backend|Backend|SaleTab|CloneTab|CustomerListTab|CustomerCard|CustomerDetailView|MasterDataTab|AppointmentTab|FinanceTab|DepositPanel|WalletPanel|MembershipPanel|PointsPanel|TreatmentFormPage|BackendDashboard)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Backend files should NOT be deployed via vercel --prod. Commit only." >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

echo '{"additionalContext": "[IRON-CLAD 2026-04-19, NEVER FORGET] A. ทำ X แล้ว Y พัง → ถอด X ทันที. B. firebase deploy --only firestore:rules ต้อง probe webhook (chat_conversations POST) + sync (pc_appointments PATCH) ก่อน/หลัง — 403 = revert ทันที (root cause ของ 2026-04-19 chat+calendar outage). C. Rule of 3 / crypto.getRandomValues (NOT Math.random) / NO user.uid in public docs / NO allow:if-true ยกเว้น pc_* + chat_conversations (server REST no admin SDK) / NO new Firestore collection without reader+writer+size-reason. D. bug → adversarial test + audit skill invariant + register in /audit-all. See .claude/rules/01-iron-clad.md, 02-workflow.md, 03-stack.md, 04-thai-ui.md. Audit: /audit-all (17 skills / 175 invariants). [SESSION CONTEXT] Phase 8/12 DONE. 1054 tests pass. PDPA PV1-PV7 REVERTED — do NOT re-add. Triangle Rule: before any feature → opd.js intel + plan memory + grep our code."}'

echo '{"additionalContext": "[IRON-CLAD] A: bug → revert immediately. B: firestore:rules ต้อง probe-deploy-probe. C: Rule of 3 / crypto tokens / no uid in public docs / no allow:if-true. D: bug → test + skill invariant. Triangle: opd.js + plan + code before coding. (.claude/rules/01-iron-clad.md)"}'
